## Summary

Brief description of the change and why it is needed.

## Related issue

Closes #(issue number) or references related discussion.

## Checklist

- [ ] Local smoke test passes (`./.github/actions/smoke-test/build.sh <template>` and `test.sh`)
- [ ] `devcontainer-template.json` is valid JSON and options match placeholders
- [ ] `bootstrap.sh` passes `shellcheck`
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior changes
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional commits
